metadata.description: Harness-aligned Claude Code marketplace: behavioral steering, context management, memory architecture, evaluation, orchestration, and multi-agent decomposition.

plugins.name: behavioral-core
plugins.description: Behavioral steering via modular hooks: 8 principle-based rules, destructive command blocking, scope compliance guard, self-review enforcement, output style safety

plugins.name: context-engine
plugins.description: Context management: progressive pressure tracking, session handoffs, drift detection, edit safety, large-file warnings, plan mode hooks, MCP monitoring, prompt budget awareness

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Three-tier memory architecture: pointer index, on-demand topics, searchable transcripts

plugins.name: evaluator
plugins.description: Evaluator-optimizer pattern: adversarial review, verification gates (Stop + TaskCompleted), static analysis, postmortems

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Orchestration patterns: task routing, explore-plan-implement cycle, daily rituals

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Multi-agent decomposition: planner/generator/reviewer triad with tool-isolated capability boundaries

plugins.name: reference
plugins.description: Power-user reference: extended thinking, unix pipes, parallel execution patterns

plugins.name: traces
plugins.description: Execution trace collection, analysis, and harness evolution. Stores structured JSONL traces for pattern detection and failure-driven improvement.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Always-on compressed communication. Drops articles, filler, pleasantries from responses. Reduces output tokens ~65% while keeping technical accuracy. Loaded at session start, survives compaction.

plugins.name: token-efficiency
plugins.description: Prevents token waste: duplicate read detection, large output warnings, session token audit

plugins.name: diagnostics
plugins.description: Codebase health scanning: documentation drift, registration gaps, convention violations, stale memory, HARNESS_SPEC invariant compliance

plugins.name: research-gate
plugins.description: Mechanical enforcement of read-before-edit: blocks Edit/Write on files not Read in the current session. Based on issue #42796 data showing 33.7% of edits made to unread files.
